summary: Herion Iteration 15 Testing Complete - UI Refactor. All frontend features verified: navbar restructure (logo-only, 5 primary items, Altro dropdown with 7 secondary items), dashboard redesign (hero with HERION background text, bento KPIs), global palette swap (#0F4C5C→#0A192F, #5DD9C1→#3B82F6), follow-up toast error fix. Backend unchanged and working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 tested the complete UI refactor. All features verified working: (1) Navbar: Logo icon only (H), 5 primary nav items (Dashboard, Pratiche, Email, Scadenze, Governance), 'Altro' dropdown with 7 secondary items (Catalogo, Archivio, Follow-Up, Allerte, Attivita, Herion AI, Centro Invii), 'Comunicazioni Attive' email live indicator, user menu with Profilo/Esci. (2) Dashboard: Hero section with 'PIATTAFORMA OPERATIVA' label, 'Ciao, [Name]' welcome, 'HERION' background text, 'Nuova Pratica' button. Bento-style KPIs with navy 'Totale Pratiche' hero card and white supporting cards. Smart reminder banner with carousel. Operational status cards. Recent practices with status badges. Notifications panel with unread badge and 'Segna lette'. AI agents banner with link to /agents. (3) Follow-up toast error fix verified - no toast.error on page load. (4) Email center still works with template flow. (5) Global palette: no old colors (#0F4C5C, #5DD9C1) found in visible UI.
